finds.name: Regatta Thompson Half-Zip Fleece, Olive Night
finds.why: Best budget lead in weeks for standing request (a) - a plain olive funnel-neck half-zip, roughly GBP16-26, also stocked at Decathlon, SportsDirect and Mountain Warehouse. Two caveats: it carries a small embroidered Regatta chest logo, and size L stock plus exact price could not be confirmed from Charlies' AJAX (WooCommerce) markup this run - hold, confirm L and branding before promoting

finds.name: Real Hoxton Olive M-65 Field Jacket
finds.why: Surfaced as a new budget/mid outerwear candidate against the brief's M-65 reference, but the product page returns HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) so price and size L stock are unverifiable this run - reject as unverifiable, retry next pass

finds.name: CC Men's Field Jacket, olive (M-65 pattern, 7oz waterproofed cotton)
finds.why: Closest match yet to the brief's stated M-65 reference - on-palette, zero branding, UK-made - but size L is sold out (only XS and S live) and it is full price at GBP100 with no discount - reject, worth a restock watch

finds.name: CC Men's George Lightweight Collarless Overshirt, olive
finds.why: On-palette, no logos, UK-made and L is freely available (XS-XXL all live), but GBP109 at full price with no discount puts it GBP29 over the sub-GBP80 preference - reject, watch for a sale

finds.name: CC Men's Chore Jacket, olive (320g cotton canvas)
finds.why: Correct workwear silhouette and palette with L in stock, but GBP140 full price is well over the preference and above the target set for the already-tracked UW Bakers chore jacket - reject

finds.name: Lee 101 Heavyweight Wool Overshirt, black - Statement Store
finds.why: Fifth stockist checked against request (b); product page and .js endpoint both return HTTP 404 - reject. Request (b) is now dead at 5 of 5 stockists, leaving jeanstore (S-only) as the last live listing anywhere

finds.name: Lee 101 Wool Overshirt, black - Butterscotch LB
finds.why: Fourth stockist checked against request (b); product page and .js endpoint both return HTTP 404, listing gone - reject

finds.name: Community Clothing Men's Lambswool Cardigan, charcoal (UK-knitted, Hawick)
finds.why: On-palette and UK-made against request (c), but it is a plain button cardigan rather than shawl-collar, GBP19 over the GBP80 cap, and size L is sold out (only S and 3XL live) - reject

finds.name: Lee 101 Wool Overshirt, black - Cultizm
finds.why: Alternate stockist for the tracked #17 row against request (b), discounted 32% from GBP160 - but every size S-XXL is sold out - reject

finds.name: Lee 101 Wool Blend Overshirt, black - John Lewis
finds.why: Third stockist checked against request (b); the product page still resolves but serves no price and no size selector, so it is effectively delisted - reject
